creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
22.06.2011 11:52, Ashish SHUKLA Ð¿Ð¸ÑÐµÑ:
> Hi Ruslan,
>
> I tried ejabberd 2.1.8. And everything went fine, though I noticed following
> in my ejabberd.log:
>
> before update:
>
> --8<---------------cut here---------------start------------->8---
> I(<0.25063.1>:ejabberd_app:72) : ejabberd 2.1.6 is started in the node ejabberd@localhost
> --8<---------------cut here---------------end--------------->8---
>
> after update :P:
>
> --8<---------------cut here---------------start------------->8---
> I(<0.36.0>:ejabberd_app:72) : ejabberd 2.1.7 is started in the node ejabberd@localhost
> --8<---------------cut here---------------end--------------->8---
>
> after applying attached diff[1]:
>
> --8<---------------cut here---------------start------------->8---
> I(<0.36.0>:ejabberd_app:72) : ejabberd 2.1.8 is started in the node ejabberd@localhost
> --8<---------------cut here---------------end--------------->8---
>
> I guess I should apply that diff. What is your opinion ?
>
> References:
> [1]  http://people.freebsd.org/~ashish/diffs/ejabberd-2.1.8-version.diff
>
> Thanks

I agree, it seems that they were too fast to release
2.1.8 and forget to change version.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan
